title: ORM Error Handling Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on handling database and ORM errors in your application.

questions.question: What is the primary way to catch asynchronous errors from your ORM?
What HTTP status code is most appropriate for a validation error from your ORM?
Which of these is a valid way to check for a validation error in Sequelize?
When is it appropriate to return a 503 (Service Unavailable) status code?
options: When the database connection has failed
When a specific record is not found
